title: パーティーはあの場所で

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway after training,
when...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
choice_data_list: Good to see you too, Trainer Kiryuin!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So many things have happened over the last three
years, haven't they?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't seem like such a long time, but these
last few years have been the most memorable
time of my life.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I never thought I'd be able to make
a friend I could talk to like this.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But with your help, I've been able to learn so
much. Thank you, from the bottom of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to seeing what's in store for us in
the future,
Trainer <username>!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
As fellow trainers, let's continue to work together
and give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Also, if it's all right with you... I was thinking
about inviting both Meek and
<chrname> out...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You know... to have a party celebrating all of our
hard work...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
How does karaoke sound? Maybe I'm being a
little too presumptuous, but I've already done
some research on a potential spot.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The food there looks great, and it's really popular
with the younger crowd. I think they'll both enjoy
it!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Great! They have this neat feature where you can
order food via remote control, so feel free to use
it whenever you like!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We invite <chrname> and
Happy Meek, and we all have a great time
singing and eating together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We invite <chrname> and
Happy Meek, and we all have a great time
singing and eating together.
